title: eleocharis divaricata
intro: Eleocharis divaricata is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is also known as split-flush spike-rush and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis divaricata include reducing swelling and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin infections, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
